body.svg:
<svg viewBox="0 0 620 470" role="img" aria-label="判断是不是一元一次方程的三道关卡流程图">
        <defs>
          <marker id="ar" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="10" refX="8" refY="3" orient="auto"><path d="M0,0 L0,6 L9,3 z" fill="#0E7C9B"/></marker>
          <marker id="arx" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="10" refX="8" refY="3" orient="auto"><path d="M0,0 L0,6 L9,3 z" fill="#C0492B"/></marker>
        </defs>

        <!-- input -->
        <rect x="150" y="18" width="200" height="52" rx="12" fill="#E1F1F5" stroke="#0E7C9B" stroke-width="2"/>
        <text x="250" y="42" text-anchor="middle" font-size="15" font-weight="700" fill="#0A5E76">任意一个方程</text>
        <text x="250" y="61" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" fill="#15201F">例：3x + 6 = 0</text>
        <path d="M250 70 V96" stroke="#0E7C9B" stroke-width="2.5" marker-end="url(#ar)"/>

        <!-- gate 1 -->
        <rect x="120" y="100" width="260" height="48" rx="10" fill="#F5F9F9" stroke="#0E7C9B" stroke-width="2"/>
        <text x="250" y="121" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14.5" font-weight="700" fill="#0A5E76">第一关　只有一个元吗？</text>
        <text x="250" y="139" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12.5" fill="#4C5A58">一元</text>
        <path d="M380 124 H470" stroke="#C0492B" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arx)"/>
        <text x="475" y="120" font-size="12.5" fill="#C0492B">否 → x + y = 6</text>
        <text x="475" y="137" font-size="12" fill="#8A9795">两个元</text>
        <path d="M250 148 V176" stroke="#15A06A" stroke-width="2.5" marker-end="url(#ar)"/>

        <!-- gate 2 -->
        <rect x="120" y="180" width="260" height="48" rx="10" fill="#F5F9F9" stroke="#0E7C9B" stroke-width="2"/>
        <text x="250" y="201" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14.5" font-weight="700" fill="#0A5E76">第二关　元的最高次数是 1 吗？</text>
        <text x="250" y="219" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12.5" fill="#4C5A58">一次</text>
        <path d="M380 204 H470" stroke="#C0492B" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arx)"/>
        <text x="475" y="200" font-size="12.5" fill="#C0492B">否 → x² + 1 = 5</text>
        <text x="475" y="217" font-size="12" fill="#8A9795">最高二次</text>
        <path d="M250 228 V256" stroke="#15A06A" stroke-width="2.5" marker-end="url(#ar)"/>

        <!-- gate 3 -->
        <rect x="120" y="260" width="260" height="48" rx="10" fill="#F5F9F9" stroke="#0E7C9B" stroke-width="2"/>
        <text x="250" y="281" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14.5" font-weight="700" fill="#0A5E76">第三关　是整式（元不在分母）吗？</text>
        <text x="250" y="299" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12.5" fill="#4C5A58">整式方程</text>
        <path d="M380 284 H470" stroke="#C0492B" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arx)"/>
        <text x="475" y="280" font-size="12.5" fill="#C0492B">否 → 2/x + 1 = 3</text>
        <text x="475" y="297" font-size="12" fill="#8A9795">元在分母</text>
        <path d="M250 308 V336" stroke="#15A06A" stroke-width="2.5" marker-end="url(#ar)"/>

        <!-- output -->
        <rect x="95" y="340" width="310" height="58" rx="12" fill="#E4F6EE" stroke="#15A06A" stroke-width="2.5"/>
        <text x="250" y="364" text-anchor="middle" font-size="15.5" font-weight="700" fill="#0F7D52">三关都过 → 一元一次方程</text>
        <text x="250" y="386" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" fill="#15201F">一般形式　a x + b = 0（a ≠ 0）</text>

        <text x="250" y="432" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12.5" fill="#8A9795">只要一关不过，就不是一元一次方程</text>
      </svg>
